title: Mining Excavation Dimension
description: Adds a New Stone Dimension. It Makes Mining Much Easier Than In The Overworld
body:
![mining logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e633a76f2068e8142d8d2b7a991256f624e167bd.png)
**NB! SOME MODED ORES DO NOT GENERATE BECAUSE THEY USE A DIFFERENT BLOCK REPLACE**

Mining Excavation Dimension is a mod that adds a new dimension to your minecraft server.
The world is made entirely of stone. This makes it easier to generate ores.
We recommend you to download our ( Mining Drills ) mod to make your mining even easier! 

Download mining drills here: [Mining drills & Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mining-drills)

![ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1b42aec1535bfa421ae11dd0cf8e9a4dccf3238.png)
![mod info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d922e3014f8b953624025a897f9329661dbe6c.png)
1 - This mod is fully compatible with The **most** modded ores.

3 -  Portal can be builded with crying obsidian.

![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42e923ae290516c4457d262eabcbde4a00067d56.png)

4 - Craft ( Purple Powder ) to turn on the portal.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/896773cef4b5134c62039b791891de1fcee8fa12.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
